mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tb_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, phone, password, description FROM tb_user WHERE username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, username, phone, password, description FROM tb_user WHERE id BETWEEN #{startId} AND #{endId} ORDER BY id ASC
